summary: Many dimensions mildly present, none dominant: the day was textured but even.

voice_notes.notes: When many dimensions are mildly present, the day was textured without one signal dominating. Never call this balance; describe the unevenness.

signal_moments: the new thing you tried briefly
the help you offered without making it a thing
the order you brought to a single corner
exemplars.output: There was a new thing you tried today, briefly. There was help you offered without making it a thing, and one small corner you brought into order before you left it. None of those took over the day. The colour of the day is a colour made of several small ones, and the result is more textured than it looks.
exemplars.notes: Refuses 'balanced' as a label; centres the texture of small distinct moves.
